text.en: Herbert Bay, Tinne Tuytelaars, and Luc Van Gool introduced SURF as a faster scale- and rotation-invariant local feature detector and descriptor. It used integral images and approximated Hessian responses to make robust matching more efficient.
text.zh: 赫伯特·贝、蒂娜·图伊特拉尔斯和卢克·范古尔提出 SURF，作为更快速的尺度与旋转不变局部特征检测器和描述子。它使用积分图和近似 Hessian 响应，让稳健匹配更高效。
